zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes De La Schaw於1375年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可時，她的父親Sir Alexander de la Schaw26歲，母親Janet Galbraith Crawford25歲。她於大約1398年與Henry de Lockwood在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年在英國素福爾可艾也享年111歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes De La Schaw于1375年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可时，她的父亲Sir Alexander de la Schaw26岁，母亲Janet Galbraith Crawford25岁。她于大约1398年与Henry de Lockwood在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年在英国素福爾可艾也享年111岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Schaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for a herdsman, from Middle High German schāf, schāp ‘sheep’.

variants.name: Schaaf
meanings: Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from schaaf ‘plane’. Compare Vanderschaaf 2.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes De La Schaw was born in 1375, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, was 26 and her mother, Janet Galbraith Crawford, was 25. She married Henry de Lockwood about 1398, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1486, in Eye, Suffolk, England, at the age of 111.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes De La Schaw est née en 1375, à Greenock, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Janet Galbraith Crawford, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Lockwood environ 1398, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1486, à Eye, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 111 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes De La Schaw 1375 in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander de la Schaw 26 und ihre Mutter Janet Galbraith Crawford 25. Sie hat um 1398 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Henry de Lockwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1486 im Alter von 111 Jahren in Eye, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes De La Schaw è nata il nel 1375 nel Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Janet Galbraith Crawford, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Lockwood circa 1398, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1486, nel Eye, Suffolk, England, all'età di 111 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes De La Schawが1375年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de la Schawは26歳，母Janet Galbraith Crawfordは25歳であった。約1398年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでHenry de Lockwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年にイギリススフォルクエイで111歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes De La Schaw(이)가 1375년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander de la Schaw(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Galbraith Crawford(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Henry de Lockwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 수폴크 예에서 111세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes De La Schaw nasceu em 1375, em Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Janet Galbraith Crawford, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Lockwood aproximadamente 1398, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1486, em Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 111 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes De La Schaw родилась в 1375 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander de la Schaw было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Galbraith Crawford, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Lockwood около 1398 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1486 г. в местности эи, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 111 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes De La Schaw nació en 1375, en Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Janet Galbraith Crawford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Henry de Lockwood aproximadamente 1398, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1486, en Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 111 años.
